description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: On the tickets section, register for the lowest-priced active ticket that includes live Q&A access and is priced under $80, then fill in the requested attendee details and continue to the payment step.
tasks.name: On the tickets section, register for the lowest-priced active ticket that includes live Q&A access and is priced under $80, then fill in the requested attendee details and continue to the payment step.
tasks.description: On the tickets section, register for the lowest-priced active ticket that includes live Q&A access and is priced under $80, then fill in the requested attendee details and continue to the payment step.

tasks.instruction: From the schedule, switch the time zone to Pacific Time and reserve the first weekday live session that begins at or after 6:00 PM, booking one seat for live attendance and entering the requested contact email.

target_names: Live Webinar: Evening Session (6:00 PM PT)

tasks.name: From the schedule, switch the time zone to Pacific Time and reserve the first weekday live session that begins at or after 6:00 PM, booking one seat for live attendance and entering the requested contact email.
tasks.description: From the schedule, switch the time zone to Pacific Time and reserve the first weekday live session that begins at or after 6:00 PM, booking one seat for live attendance and entering the requested contact email.

tasks.instruction: From the pricing section, select the main standard-level ticket type, apply any available promo code that gives a discount on it at checkout, then continue using a single one-time payment option instead of any installment plan while entering the requested attendee name.
tasks.name: From the pricing section, select the main standard-level ticket type, apply any available promo code that gives a discount on it at checkout, then continue using a single one-time payment option instead of any installment plan while entering the requested attendee name.
tasks.description: From the pricing section, select the main standard-level ticket type, apply any available promo code that gives a discount on it at checkout, then continue using a single one-time payment option instead of any installment plan while entering the requested attendee name.

tasks.instruction: In the agenda tools, filter sessions to beginner level with no equipment required, add three different sessions that match these filters to your personal agenda, and then open your agenda view so all three are shown.
tasks.name: In the agenda tools, filter sessions to beginner level with no equipment required, add three different sessions that match these filters to your personal agenda, and then open your agenda view so all three are shown.
tasks.description: In the agenda tools, filter sessions to beginner level with no equipment required, add three different sessions that match these filters to your personal agenda, and then open your agenda view so all three are shown.

tasks.instruction: In the coaching packages area, choose the lowest-priced active plan that includes both 1:1 coaching and a personalized meal plan and supports registering two people, set the registration for two attendees, and proceed with the primary attendee details.
tasks.name: In the coaching packages area, choose the lowest-priced active plan that includes both 1:1 coaching and a personalized meal plan and supports registering two people, set the registration for two attendees, and proceed with the primary attendee details.
tasks.description: In the coaching packages area, choose the lowest-priced active plan that includes both 1:1 coaching and a personalized meal plan and supports registering two people, set the registration for two attendees, and proceed with the primary attendee details.

tasks.instruction: In the FAQ section, open the payments/refunds category, view the answer about being unable to attend live, use its link to open the contact form, and submit a message about refunding or rescheduling using the requested name, email, and topic selection.

target_names: What if I can't attend live?

expected_values.contact_message: I need to reschedule my webinar attendance and would like to understand my options.

tasks.name: In the FAQ section, open the payments/refunds category, view the answer about being unable to attend live, use its link to open the contact form, and submit a message about refunding or rescheduling using the requested name, email, and topic selection.
tasks.description: In the FAQ section, open the payments/refunds category, view the answer about being unable to attend live, use its link to open the contact form, and submit a message about refunding or rescheduling using the requested name, email, and topic selection.

tasks.instruction: In the testimonials section, filter stories to the busy-parents segment, open the second testimonial in that filtered list, use its button to select the recommended program track, and begin registration with that track while entering the requested name and email.
tasks.name: In the testimonials section, filter stories to the busy-parents segment, open the second testimonial in that filtered list, use its button to select the recommended program track, and begin registration with that track while entering the requested name and email.
tasks.description: In the testimonials section, filter stories to the busy-parents segment, open the second testimonial in that filtered list, use its button to select the recommended program track, and begin registration with that track while entering the requested name and email.

tasks.instruction: In the free resources area, open the signup for pre-webinar prep content, enter the requested name and email, select only the topics related to strength training and mobility/recovery, deselect any others, and submit the form.
tasks.name: In the free resources area, open the signup for pre-webinar prep content, enter the requested name and email, select only the topics related to strength training and mobility/recovery, deselect any others, and submit the form.
tasks.description: In the free resources area, open the signup for pre-webinar prep content, enter the requested name and email, select only the topics related to strength training and mobility/recovery, deselect any others, and submit the form.

tasks.instruction: Use the group or team registration option to select the standard-level ticket type, set the quantity to four seats with you as the team coordinator paying for all attendees in a single payment, and continue after filling in the requested coordinator details.
tasks.name: Use the group or team registration option to select the standard-level ticket type, set the quantity to four seats with you as the team coordinator paying for all attendees in a single payment, and continue after filling in the requested coordinator details.
